metadata.name: File a Property Tax Assessment Appeal

description: A homeowner believes their property tax assessment is too high and wants to file an appeal.

nodes.task_description: Identify the homeowner and their property parcel.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates the correct property record.

nodes.task_description: Explain the appeals process and provide the necessary forms.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the steps and provides a link to the appeal application form.

nodes.task_description: Accept the submitted appeal application and schedule a hearing with the assessment board.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent logs the appeal and schedules a hearing date.
